login.title: Login
login.description: Use your username or email to get a token.

profile.title: Profile
profile.notAuthenticated: You are not signed in. Please use the login page.
profile.tokenHint: The session token is automatically sent in the
profile.tokenHintSuffix: header when calling the profile API.

auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.authRequired: You must be signed in to access this page.
auth.accessDenied: Access denied: you do not have the required permissions.

profile.noToken: No active token found. Please sign in.
profile.loadFailed: Unable to load profile. Please try again.

home.title: Welcome to Bro World
home.description: Nuxt 4 project configured with Vuetify and the Material Dashboard style.

admin.description: This page is restricted to users with the administrator role.

form.passwordHint: Leave blank to keep current value

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage user accounts (read, search, and API actions).

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Browse and manage roles exposed by /api/v1/role.

groups.title: User groups
groups.description: Monitor user groups and their associated roles.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.description: List and manage API keys available on /api/v1/api_key.

platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.description: Browse and manage platform entries and metadata.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.description: Manage plugin catalog, states and integrations.

configurations.title: Configurations
configurations.description: View and maintain available configuration sets.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: View key statistics and activity indicators.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure global platform information and options.

userManagement.title: User Management
userManagement.description: Access users, roles, groups and API key administration.

platformManagement.title: Platform Management
platformManagement.description: Manage platforms and plugins used by the application.

configurationManagement.title: Configuration Management
configurationManagement.description: Access global configuration modules and settings lists.

dashboard.title: Admin dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of platform activity and usage metrics.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your site configuration from this form.

userManagement.title: User management
userManagement.description: Choose a section to administer users and access rights.

platformManagement.title: Platform management
platformManagement.description: Choose a section to administer platforms and plugins.

configurationManagement.title: Configuration management
configurationManagement.description: Choose a section to administer configuration resources.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: Oops… this address does not exist (or no longer does).
notFound.description: Check the URL or return to the homepage to continue exploring Bro World.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.subtitle: Our team has been notified automatically.
generic.description: Please try again in a few moments.

platform.title: Platform
platform.description: Discover the main entry point of Bro World and navigate to key sections.

newPlatform.title: + New Platform
newPlatform.description: Create a new user application and configure its plugins.
newPlatform.connectDescription: You must be signed in to create a new platform.

crm1.title: CRM 1
crm1.description: Complete CRM module to centralize customer relationships, track opportunities, and structure commercial activity.

crm2.title: CRM 2
crm2.description: Complete CRM module to centralize customer relationships, track opportunities, and structure commercial activity.

shop.title: Shop Principal
shop.description: E-commerce suite to manage product catalogs, orders, payments, and sales performance.

recruit.title: Recruit Principal
recruit.description: Recruitment workspace to publish job offers, qualify applications, and manage interviews efficiently.

school.title: School Principal
school.description: School module to organize classes, plan lessons, and monitor learner progress.

about.title: About
about.description: Learn more about Bro World, our mission, and the product vision.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Find quick answers to common questions about the platform.
faq.a1: Use the Login page and enter your username or email with your password.
faq.q2: Is the platform available in French?
faq.a2: Yes, you can switch language from the top navigation bar.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Need help or have feedback? Reach out through one of our channels.

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.description: Configure your personal preferences and platform behavior.
settings.notice: More setting options will be available soon.
